articles.title: How will social media ban work and when does it start?
articles.description: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

articles.title: The US and Iran have agreed a deal. How soon could the economy go back to normal?
articles.description: Experts warn the impact of the war will continue to affect the global economy for months to come.

articles.title: Man arrested for allegedly pushing woman in front of bus in 2017
articles.description: A 44-year-old man is in custody over the incident where a woman appeared to be shoved into the path of a bus.

articles.title: OnlyFans 'agents' control and threaten creators while taking half their earnings, BBC finds
articles.description: Dozens of women on OnlyFans describe being exploited by managers who promised to help maximise profits.
